episodes.title: Geoffrey Levin on "Brothers Broken" | Music, Scientology & Family Trauma Explored
episodes.description: Director Geoffrey Levin joins The Jan Price Show All About Movies to discuss his award-winning documentary "Brothers Broken." The film tells the powerful true story of two brothers from the hit 1960s rock band PEOPLE! whose lives, careers, and relationships were shattered by Scientology. Decades later, they reunite to confront their shared trauma, break free from years of indoctrination, and begin the difficult journey toward healing and reconciliation. Blending music history, emotional storytelling, and a deeper look into cult manipulation, "Brothers Broken" explores the lasting impact of belief systems, family estrangement, and the resilience required to reclaim one’s identity. The documentary offers an intimate portrait of survival, forgiveness, and the enduring bond between brothers. 🎥 ⁠Watch the trailer⁠ 🎬 ⁠Watch on VOD⁠ 🎧 ⁠More episodes⁠ Hosted on Acast.
